input: 近7天低打标率策略分P0/P1/P2/notice的情况

sql_by_level.notice:
SELECT
  'notice' AS severity_level,
  3 AS severity_priority,
  cur.reason AS reason,
  cur.data_days AS data_days,
  cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
  cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
  cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
  cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

  0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
  0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
  0.0 AS growth_rate,
  0.0 AS daily_delta,
  'notice_low_label_rate' AS hit_rule_id,
  '近7天打标率<10%且进审量>0，纳入观察' AS hit_condition
FROM (SELECT
  reason,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
  SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
  SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
  if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    `[reason]` AS reason,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
      '不良行为或争议价值观',
      '侵犯未成年权益',
      '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
      '党和国家形象负面',
      '危险行为',
      '国家安全',
      '引人不适',
      '指令舆情相关',
      '短期策略迁移',
      '色情性化',
      '违法违规',
      '领导人'
    ))
  GROUP BY reason, dt
) daily
GROUP BY reason
HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur
WHERE cur.label_rate < 0.1 AND cur.total_review_in_cnt > 0
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 1000
sql_by_level.P2:
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    'P2' AS severity_level,
    2 AS severity_priority,
    cur.reason AS reason,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
    0.0 AS growth_rate,
    0.0 AS daily_delta,
    'p2_single_strategy_low_efficiency' AS hit_rule_id,
    '近7天累计进审量>14000且打标率<3%' AS hit_condition
  FROM (SELECT
    reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `[reason]` AS reason,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
      AND `[p_date]` < today()
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur
  WHERE cur.total_review_in_cnt > 14000 AND cur.label_rate < 0.03
UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'P2' AS severity_level,
    2 AS severity_priority,
    cur.reason AS reason,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    prev.avg_review_in_cnt AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    prev.label_rate AS prev_label_rate,
    (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) / NULLIF(prev.avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS growth_rate,
    (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) AS daily_delta,
    'p2_low_efficiency_growth' AS hit_rule_id,
    '本期打标率<10%，上期日均进审>0，环比>20%，日均增量>2000' AS hit_condition
  FROM (SELECT
    reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `[reason]` AS reason,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
      AND `[p_date]` < today()
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT
    reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `[reason]` AS reason,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
      AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) prev ON cur.reason = prev.reason
  WHERE cur.label_rate < 0.1 AND prev.avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) / NULLIF(prev.avg_review_in_cnt, 0) > 0.2 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) > 2000
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 1000

SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    'P1' AS severity_level,
    1 AS severity_priority,
    cur.reason AS reason,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,

    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',

  WHERE cur.avg_review_in_cnt > 5000 AND cur.label_rate < 0.03

    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    prev.avg_review_in_cnt AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    prev.label_rate AS prev_label_rate,
    (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) / NULLIF(prev.avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS growth_rate,

  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason

  WHERE cur.label_rate < 0.1 AND prev.label_rate < 0.1 AND prev.avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) / NULLIF(prev.avg_review_in_cnt, 0) > 0.3 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) > 5000

ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 1000

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) w2 ON cur.reason = w2.reason
  WHERE cur.avg_review_in_cnt > 5000 AND cur.label_rate < 0.03 AND w2.label_rate < 0.03
UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'P0' AS severity_level,
    0 AS severity_priority,
    cur.reason AS reason,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
    0.0 AS growth_rate,
    0.0 AS daily_delta,
    'p0_single_week_ultra_high_volume_low_efficiency' AS hit_rule_id,
    '近1周日均进审>10000且打标率<3%' AS hit_condition
  FROM (SELECT
    reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `[reason]` AS reason,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
      AND `[p_date]` < today()
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur
  WHERE cur.avg_review_in_cnt > 10000 AND cur.label_rate < 0.03
UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'P0' AS severity_level,
    0 AS severity_priority,
    cur.reason AS reason,
    cur.data_days AS data_days,
    cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
    cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
    cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
    cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

    w2.avg_review_in_cnt AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
    w2.label_rate AS prev_label_rate,
    (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - w2.avg_review_in_cnt) / NULLIF(w2.avg_review_in_cnt, 0) AS growth_rate,
    (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - w2.avg_review_in_cnt) AS daily_delta,
    'p0_review_in_volume_spike' AS hit_rule_id,
    '近1周打标率<10%，日均进审环比>50%，日均增量>10000' AS hit_condition
  FROM (SELECT
    reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `[reason]` AS reason,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
      AND `[p_date]` < today()
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT
    reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `[reason]` AS reason,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
      AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) w2 ON cur.reason = w2.reason
  WHERE cur.label_rate < 0.1 AND w2.avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - w2.avg_review_in_cnt) / NULLIF(w2.avg_review_in_cnt, 0) > 0.5 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - w2.avg_review_in_cnt) > 10000
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 1000

sql_by_level.notice:
SELECT
  'notice' AS severity_level,
  3 AS severity_priority,
  cur.reason AS reason,
  cur.data_days AS data_days,
  cur.total_review_in_cnt AS total_review_in_cnt,
  cur.total_review_done_cnt AS total_review_done_cnt,
  cur.total_label_cnt AS total_label_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_in_cnt AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  cur.avg_review_done_cnt AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  cur.avg_label_cnt AS avg_label_cnt,
  cur.label_rate AS label_rate,

  0.0 AS prev_avg_review_in_cnt,
  0.0 AS prev_label_rate,
  0.0 AS growth_rate,
  0.0 AS daily_delta,
  'notice_low_label_rate' AS hit_rule_id,
  '近7天打标率<10%且进审量>0，纳入观察' AS hit_condition
FROM (SELECT
  reason,
  COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
  SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
  SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
  SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
  SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
  if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    `[reason]` AS reason,
    `[p_date]` AS dt,
    `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
    `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
    `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
  FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
  WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 7
    AND `[p_date]` < today()
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%run%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
    AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
    AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
    AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
    AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
      '不良行为或争议价值观',
      '侵犯未成年权益',
      '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
      '党和国家形象负面',
      '危险行为',
      '国家安全',
      '引人不适',
      '指令舆情相关',
      '短期策略迁移',
      '色情性化',
      '违法违规',
      '领导人'
    ))
  GROUP BY reason, dt

  FROM (

    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) cur INNER JOIN (SELECT
    reason,
    COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS data_days,
    SUM(jin_shen) AS total_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) AS total_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) AS total_label_cnt,
    SUM(jin_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_in_cnt,
    SUM(wan_shen) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_review_done_cnt,
    SUM(da_biao) / COUNT(DISTINCT dt) AS avg_label_cnt,
    if(SUM(wan_shen) = 0, 0, SUM(da_biao) / SUM(wan_shen)) AS label_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      `[reason]` AS reason,
      `[p_date]` AS dt,
      `[进审量_reviewid]` AS jin_shen,
      `[完审量_reviewid]` AS wan_shen,
      `[打标量__reviewid]` AS da_biao
    FROM olap_content_security_community.dws_sft_tcs_review_task_detail_di
    WHERE `[p_date]` >= today() - 14
      AND `[p_date]` < today() - 7
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%标注%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%虚假不实%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%封面%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%自动处置%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%演绎%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%模型%'

      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%质检%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%QA%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%测试%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%大模型%'
      AND `[project_title]` NOT LIKE '%离线%'
      AND `[scene]` IN ('community_audit_safe', 'community_audit_style', 'community_audit_moderate')
      AND `[reason]` NOT IN ('recall_skip_L6', 'fatal_output')
      AND (`[机审一级标签]` IS NULL OR `[机审一级标签]` IN (
        '不良行为或争议价值观',
        '侵犯未成年权益',
        '偏激社会情绪和涉外言论',
        '党和国家形象负面',
        '危险行为',
        '国家安全',
        '引人不适',
        '指令舆情相关',
        '短期策略迁移',
        '色情性化',
        '违法违规',
        '领导人'
      ))
    GROUP BY reason, dt
  ) daily
  GROUP BY reason
  HAVING SUM(wan_shen) > 0) prev ON cur.reason = prev.reason
  WHERE cur.label_rate < 0.1 AND prev.label_rate < 0.1 AND prev.avg_review_in_cnt > 0 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) / NULLIF(prev.avg_review_in_cnt, 0) > 0.3 AND (cur.avg_review_in_cnt - prev.avg_review_in_cnt) > 5000
) hits
ORDER BY avg_review_done_cnt DESC
LIMIT 1000
